ordinanceLabel: WCMC Chapter 7 (Building) · Chapter 26 (Zoning, Ord. 2519 March 2024) · Municode
fireAgency: West Covina Fire Department — Fire Prevention Bureau (city-operated, not LA County Fire)
buildingDeptNote: 1444 W Garvey Avenue S, Room 215, West Covina CA 91790. Phone: (626) 939-8425. Hours: Mon–Thu 7:30 AM – 5:30 PM. Digital-only submittals via GoPost/TransTech portal (no paper/email since 2023). Fire Prevention Bureau: Room 218, (626) 939-8824, wcfdplancheck@gmail.com.
